label: Established
headline: Payments trust becomes merchant workflow
businessPattern: Use a trusted transaction habit as the entry point into one adjacent merchant workflow.
whyThisWeek: PhonePe's $15B NSE filing shows Indian payment rails can become durable business infrastructure, not only a transaction layer.
copyablePrompt: Build a trust-first workflow tool for one offline merchant category that already accepts digital payments but still runs operations manually.

label: Startup
headline: Speed becomes a repeat purchase wedge
businessPattern: Turn one recurring local purchase into a habit by removing the waiting time around it.
whyThisWeek: Zepto reaching profitable per-order economics across 30 Indian cities makes speed look like an operating model, not a discount trick.
copyablePrompt: Build a neighborhood-first service that removes waiting time from one routine purchase for one dense local buyer group.

label: Frontier
headline: Local-language AI creates a product gap
businessPattern: Wrap a language-specific model advantage around one workflow global platforms overlook.
whyThisWeek: Sarvam's open-weight Indian language model gives builders a self-hostable base for vernacular software.
copyablePrompt: Build an AI workflow for one Indian-language user group whose current software assumes English.
